title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say how the technology is helping the people and what might be the disadvantages of relying on it.

images.label: A
images.description: A person using a GPS or map app on their smartphone to find their way in a foreign city.

images.label: B
images.description: A student using an e-reader or tablet to study in a cafe, with many digital books open.

followUp.question: In which situation is technology most indispensable? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why these celebrations are important to the people and how they might have prepared for them.

images.label: D
images.description: A graduation ceremony with students in caps and gowns throwing their hats in the air.

images.label: E
images.description: A large, traditional family wedding with many guests at a long dinner table.

followUp.question: Which of these celebrations do you think is the most significant milestone? (Why?)
